creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-07-18 11:13:38 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-pygpx       Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  py-gpx is a python module for parsing GPS Exchange Format (GPX) files.
  This module allows you to parse and extract data from GPX files.
  
  WWW: http://pypi.python.org/pypi/pygpx/
  
  PR:             ports/125254
  Submitted by:   Wen Heping <wenheping at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3129    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/devel/py-pygpx/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-pygpx/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/py-pygpx/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/py-pygpx/pkg-plist (new)
